title: pouteria ciliata
intro: Pouteria ciliata, also known as the velvet-stemmed pouteria, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Sapotaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pouteria ciliata include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
